content_body: This beautiful cabin was beyond more than what we ever expected! We love this place and had a fabulous time. The only problem is that we hated to leave the cabin to venture off to the Downtwon Blue Ridge LOL. We will definitely be recommending this to our friends and family and will return for future vacations. You did an amazing job with the decorating and all the finishing touches! Thank so much for sharing your home with us and we forward to returning soon.
title: Beyond our Expectations!
